Hey there! I'm doing great, thanks for asking! 😊

Welcome to Lemon Tree Insights. I'm LemonAId, your data analysis assistant for food pantry networks. I can help you explore things like:

- **Visit patterns** and trends over time
- **Food access** across your pantry network
- **Pantry operations** and performance metrics
- **Client demographics** and service reach

What can I help you dig into today?

d4e5994a-606a-4245-b44c-1973a5bd3e3c.title: what are the top pantries in newark, nj

messages.content: what are the top pantries in newark, nj

Here are the food pantries available in the Newark, NJ area:

1. **Newark Spanish 7th Day Adventist Church**
   - 📍 58 2nd Avenue, Newark, NJ 07104
   - 🛒 Food pantry (groceries)
   - ✅ Accepting new clients | No appointment needed
   - 🌐 [Website](https://newarkspanishnj.adventistchurch.org/)

2. **Newark Water Coalition - Wilson Avenue**
   - 📍 7 Wilson Avenue, Newark, NJ 07105
   - 🛒 Food pantry (groceries)
   - ✅ Accepting new clients | No appointment needed
   - 🌐 [Website](https://www.newarkwatercoalition.org/)

3. **The Salvation Army - Newark (Central)**
   - 📍 699 Springfield Avenue, West Side, NJ 07103
   - 🛒 Food pantry (groceries)
   - ✅ Accepting new clients | No appointment needed

4. **Grace Church in Newark**
   - 📍 950 Broad St, Newark, NJ 07102
   - 🛒 Food pantry (groceries)
   - ✅ Accepting new clients | No appointment needed
   - 🌐 [Website](https://www.gracechurchinnewark.org/the-food-ministry)

5. **Salvation Army - Kearny** *(nearby)*
   - 📍 443 Chestnut Street, Kearny, NJ 07032
   - 🛒 Food pantry (groceries)
   - ✅ Accepting new clients | No appointment needed
   - 🌐 [Website](https://easternusa.salvationarmy.org/new-jersey/kearny/)

All five pantries are **currently accepting new clients** and **none require an appointment**, making them easily accessible. Would you like more details on any of these locations, such as hours of operation or specific services?
